TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: lamal (kaum nu Hulam: ÁĀę ) u lamal ku kakawsan i kitakitay a lalangawan. akuti amana pitiyun. anu inay'ay ku lamal, acaay kapilalak ku lamal atu tuudtuud a mulangaw i hekal. u lamal mingizu dihku. miidid tu pabuy. a misanga sip tu nanum u i-se-lan caay pipane tu lamal kanatal. palamal ku Sakizaya mahiza u namuh nu malahululay. palamal ku Sakizaya mahiza u ai-cing
S.PHON: r~…ĺamar~…ĺ (kaum nu ńßur~…ĺam: * ) u r~…ĺamar~…ĺ ku kakawsan i kitakitaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. akuti amana pitijun. anu inaj Ē~ °aj ku r~…ĺamar~…ĺ, a ¶aaj kapir~…ĺar~…ĺak ku r~…ĺamar~…ĺ atu tuudtuud a mur~…ĺaŇčaw i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ. u r~…ĺamar~…ĺ miŇčizu dińßku. miidid tu pabuj. a misaŇča sip tu nanum u i-s…ô-r~…ĺan ¶aaj pipan…ô tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ kanatar~…ĺ. par~…ĺamar~…ĺ ku sakizaja mańßiza u namuńß nu mar~…ĺańßur~…ĺur~…ĺaj. par~…ĺamar~…ĺ ku sakizaja mańßiza u ai- ¶iŇč
S.FORM: lamal (kaum nu Hulam: ÁĀę ) u lamal ku kakawsan i kitakitay a lalangawan. akuti amana pitiyun. anu inay'ay ku lamal, acaay kapilalak ku lamal atu tuudtuud a mulangaw i hekal. u lamal mingizu dihku. miidid tu pabuy. a misanga sip tu nanum u i-se-lan caay pipane tu lamal kanatal. palamal ku Sakizaya mahiza u namuh nu malahululay. palamal ku Sakizaya mahiza u ai-cing
S.PHON: r~…ĺamar~…ĺ (kaum nu ńßur~…ĺam: * ) u r~…ĺamar~…ĺ ku kakawsan i kitakitaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. akuti amana pitijun. anu inaj Ē~ °aj ku r~…ĺamar~…ĺ, a ¶aaj kapir~…ĺar~…ĺak ku r~…ĺamar~…ĺ atu tuudtuud a mur~…ĺaŇčaw i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ. u r~…ĺamar~…ĺ miŇčizu dińßku. miidid tu pabuj. a misaŇča sip tu nanum u i-s…ô-r~…ĺan ¶aaj pipan…ô tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ kanatar~…ĺ. par~…ĺamar~…ĺ ku sakizaja mańßiza u namuńß nu mar~…ĺańßur~…ĺur~…ĺaj. par~…ĺamar~…ĺ ku sakizaja mańßiza u ai- ¶iŇč
